source: 2024 Guidelines for Admission for Holders of National Senior Certificate

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Business Science and Bachelor of Commerce - All specialisations except Actuarial Science and Computer Science
notes: FPS is the Faculty Points Score.
WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.
NBT requirements are included in programme notes, not as curriculum subject requirements.
Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.
Specialisation or stream: All specialisations except Actuarial Science and Computer Science.
Eligible applicant group: Only South African applicants in targeted redress categories.
Admission band used: Band C.
Admission outcome: Possible admission into Education Development Unit only.
Score requirement: FPS of 430 or above.

Notes: NBT scores of Upper Intermediate or above for AL and QL are required.; Probable admission: 470 WPS or above.; Guaranteed admission: 480 FPS or above.; The general minimum required for possible admission is listed as FPS of 435..

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Business Science and Bachelor of Commerce - Actuarial Science and Quantitative Finance Qualification and Stream
notes: FPS is the Faculty Points Score.
WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.
NBT requirements are included in programme notes, not as curriculum subject requirements.
Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.
Specialisation or stream: Actuarial Science and Quantitative Finance Qualification and Stream.
Eligible applicant group: Only South African applicants in targeted redress categories.
Admission band used: Band C.
Admission outcome: Possible admission into Education Development Unit only.
Score requirement: FPS of 475 or above.

Notes: NBT scores of Upper Intermediate or above for AL and QL are required.; English First Additional Language at 80% also requires Proficient for AL and QL NBTs.; Probable admission: 525 WPS or above.; Guaranteed admission: 500 FPS or above..
